name: io.github.ryanbiddy/uoink
description: Uoink keeps the videos, podcasts, and articles creators and AI developers study on their own disk, then hands them to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or a local MCP agent as a cited corpus.

install.notes: Install the free local helper, then use the .mcpb bundle for one-click Claude Desktop setup, or paste the stdio config from the setup page.

transports.note: Local-only. Full tool registry. Token in %LOCALAPPDATA%\Uoink\token.txt.
For agents that do not speak MCP (Gemini, Grok, Perplexity).
